services.title:
Blockchain Forensics
for Every Situation
services.subtitle: From romance scams to corporate fraud — we trace cryptocurrency and build actionable intelligence for legal recovery.

tracing.title: Crypto Asset Tracing
tracing.desc: We follow funds across Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tron, BNB and other chains. Transaction mapping, cluster analysis, and exchange identification — delivered as a court-ready forensic report.

litigation.title: Litigation Support
litigation.desc: Court-ready reports and expert witness services for attorneys. We help legal teams build evidence-backed cases involving fraud, divorce with crypto assets, and business disputes.

romance.title: Romance Scam Investigations
romance.desc: Pig butchering, fake trading platforms, and love scams. We trace where your funds went and identify the exchanges and individuals responsible.

law_enforcement.title: Law Enforcement Assistance
law_enforcement.desc: We support criminal investigations with blockchain analysis, subpoena targeting, and OSINT — bridging the gap between technical evidence and legal action.

corporate.title: Corporate & Business Fraud
corporate.desc: Employee theft, investment fraud, ransomware payments — we trace internal and external crypto fraud with full chain-of-custody documentation.

divorce.title: Divorce & Probate
divorce.desc: Hidden crypto assets in divorce proceedings or estates. We identify and value undisclosed cryptocurrency holdings to ensure equitable distribution.

russian_banner.title: Говорим по-русски — без посредников
russian_banner.desc: Наша команда проводит консультации на русском языке. Если вы стали жертвой мошенничества с криптовалютой — мы готовы помочь разобраться в ситуации.

how.title:
From Scam to
Evidence in Days
how.subtitle: A clear, transparent process — you always know where your case stands.
how.step1_desc: Share your wallet address, transaction IDs, and timeline. We assess traceability and provide an honest opinion within 24 hours — at no charge.
how.step2_desc: Our certified investigators use professional blockchain intelligence tools to trace fund flows, identify exchange interactions, and map the full transaction chain.
how.step3_desc: You receive a detailed forensic report within 48–72 hours: transaction maps, entity attribution, identified exchanges, and recommended legal next steps.
how.step4_desc: We work alongside your attorney or law enforcement, supporting subpoenas, freezing orders, and expert testimony as the case develops.

cases.title:
Real Cases.
Real Evidence.
cases.subtitle: Every case is unique. These examples illustrate the type of investigations we conduct and outcomes we've helped achieve.
cases.case1_desc: Victim sent funds to a fake trading platform over 6 months. We traced 47 transactions across 4 chains, identifying 2 KYC exchanges in Singapore and Hong Kong.
cases.case1_result: Attorney filed freezing order — exchange cooperation obtained
cases.case2_desc: Spouse claimed crypto was "lost". Our forensic analysis located 6 undisclosed wallets and documented full transfer history for court submission.
cases.case2_result: Hidden assets identified — case settled in client's favor
cases.case3_desc: Employee diverted company funds via crypto. We traced the complete path from corporate account to cash-out exchange, with full documentation.
cases.case3_result: Criminal referral filed · Evidence accepted by DA

pricing.title:
No Hidden Fees.
Know What You Pay.
pricing.subtitle: Unlike most firms, we publish our pricing. Every case starts with a free evaluation — you only pay when we proceed.
pricing.basic_desc: Single blockchain, straightforward transaction trail. Results in 48 hours.
pricing.full_desc: Multi-chain, complex cases. Full forensic package for legal proceedings.
pricing.expert_desc: Litigation support, depositions, and court testimony for attorneys.

why.title:
What Makes LedgerHound
Different
why.w1_desc: Every competitor hides their fees. We believe you deserve to know costs upfront — no surprises, no pressure calls just to get a quote.
why.w2_desc: Before you spend a dollar, we assess your case for free. You'll know within 24 hours if your funds are traceable and what your realistic options are.
why.w3_desc: We're the only US-based crypto forensics firm serving Russian-speaking victims directly. No translators — clear answers in your language.
why.w4_desc: Our investigators hold CTCE and CFE certifications. Every report is structured for legal proceedings — not just informational summaries attorneys can't use.
why.w5_desc: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tron, BNB, Solana, Polygon and more. Most firms only cover Bitcoin. We follow your funds wherever they go — including DeFi and mixers.
why.w6_desc: We work alongside legal teams and have established relationships with law enforcement. We don't just hand you a report — we help you act on it.

cta.title:
Your Funds Left a Trail.
Let's Find It.
cta.desc: Start with a free, no-obligation case evaluation. Tell us what happened and we'll give you an honest assessment within 24 hours.
cta.privacy: Confidential. No spam. No obligation. We respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Certified blockchain forensics for fraud victims, attorneys, and businesses.
footer.legal_note: Not a law firm. We do not provide legal advice. Forensic investigation services only.

blog.title: Insights & Guides
blog.subtitle: Expert analysis on crypto fraud, blockchain forensics, and asset recovery.

calculator.title: Crypto Recovery
calculator.subtitle: Answer 6 quick questions to estimate your chances of tracing and recovering stolen cryptocurrency. Free, instant, no signup required.
calculator.seo_desc: Find out your chances of recovering stolen cryptocurrency. Free assessment based on case details — used by fraud victims and attorneys.
calculator.question: Question
calculator.q1_title: How much cryptocurrency did you lose?
calculator.q3_title: Do you have the wallet address or transaction hash?
calculator.q3_o3: No, but I have the platform name
calculator.q4_title: Which blockchain or platform was used?
calculator.q5_title: Did funds go through a major exchange?
calculator.q5_o1: Yes, I sent to Coinbase/Binance/Kraken directly
calculator.q5_o2: Possibly — platform claimed to use a major exchange
calculator.q6_title: Have you reported to law enforcement?
calculator.high_msg: Your case has strong indicators for successful tracing. Early action is critical — the blockchain trail is still fresh.
calculator.moderate_msg: Your funds are likely traceable but require professional blockchain intelligence tools and certified methodology.
calculator.low_moderate_msg: Tracing is possible but may be limited. A professional evaluation can determine the exact scope.
calculator.low_msg: This will be a challenging investigation, but do not give up — even difficult cases have yielded results. Get a free evaluation to understand your options.
calculator.factor_amount_high: Significant loss amount — justifies professional investigation
calculator.factor_amount_low: Lower loss amount — may limit cost-effective recovery options
calculator.factor_time_good: Recent incident — blockchain trail is still fresh
calculator.factor_time_bad: Older case — funds may have been moved multiple times
calculator.factor_evidence_good: Strong evidence available — wallet address or TX hash identified
calculator.factor_evidence_bad: Limited evidence — harder to start the trace
calculator.factor_chain_good: Major blockchain — well-supported by forensic tools
calculator.factor_exchange_good: Major exchange involved — KYC data may be available via subpoena
calculator.factor_exchange_bad: Mixer or privacy tools used — makes tracing more difficult
calculator.factor_reported_good: Law enforcement involved — strengthens legal recovery options
calculator.factor_reported_bad: Not yet reported — filing a report can unlock additional recovery tools
calculator.what_next_desc: Based on your answers, an initial trace report typically takes 48–72 hours. A professional investigator will map the flow of funds, identify exchanges, and deliver a court-ready forensic report.
calculator.intro_p1: This calculator estimates the traceability of your stolen cryptocurrency based on six key factors that professional blockchain investigators evaluate. While every case is unique, these indicators have proven reliable across thousands of fraud investigations.
calculator.intro_p2: The assessment is instant and free — no signup or personal information required.
calculator.cta_page_desc: Get a free, confidential case evaluation from our blockchain forensics team. We'll review your situation and give you an honest assessment of your recovery options.

report.title: Forensic Wallet
report.subtitle: Get an automated blockchain forensic report for any Ethereum wallet. Risk scoring, transaction analysis, entity identification, and legal recommendations — delivered to your email in minutes.
report.secure_note: Secure payment via Stripe. Report delivered to your email.
report.include_5: Wallet activity timeline and volume analytics
report.include_8: Court-ready PDF format with case ID
report.sample_desc: Each report includes 7 pages of detailed forensic analysis, generated using the same blockchain intelligence tools used by professional investigators. Suitable for attorney review, insurance claims, and law enforcement referrals.
report.faq_1_q: How fast will I receive my report?
report.faq_1_a: Reports are generated automatically and delivered to your email within 2–5 minutes after payment.
report.faq_2_q: Is this a certified forensic investigation?
report.faq_2_a: This is an automated preliminary analysis. For certified, court-ready forensic investigations with expert testimony, contact us for a full engagement.
report.faq_3_a: Currently Ethereum and ERC-20 tokens. Bitcoin and other chain support coming soon.
report.faq_4_q: Can I use this report in court?
report.faq_4_a: This report provides factual blockchain data suitable for preliminary review. For court submissions, we recommend our certified forensic investigation service.
report.success_subtitle: Check your email in 2–3 minutes. The report will be delivered as a PDF attachment.
report.success_try_tools_desc: Explore wallet transactions and fund flows with our free blockchain tools.
report.success_need_more_desc: Our certified forensic team can provide court-ready reports with expert testimony.
report.cta_desc: Automated reports are a great starting point. For complex cases requiring court testimony, certified methodology, and attorney support — our forensic team is ready.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: USPROJECT LLC ("we", "us", "our"), operating as LedgerHound, is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacy.s1_p1: We collect information you provide directly:
privacy.s1_i1: Personal information: name, email address, phone number
privacy.s1_i2: Cryptocurrency wallet addresses submitted for analysis
privacy.s1_i3: Payment information processed securely by Stripe
privacy.s1_i4: Communications and correspondence with our team
privacy.s1_p2: We automatically collect: IP address, browser type, pages visited, and analytics data.
privacy.s2_i2: Generating and delivering wallet analysis reports
privacy.s2_i4: Communicating about your case or inquiry
privacy.s3_p1: We retain personal data for 2 years from your last interaction. Forensic reports and case files may be retained longer if required for ongoing legal proceedings. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.s4_p1: We use the following third-party services:
privacy.s4_i3: Alchemy — blockchain data retrieval (public data only)
privacy.s4_p2: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to any third party.
privacy.s5_p1: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
privacy.s6_p1: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacy.s6_p2: For GDPR (EU/EEA) and CCPA (California) requests, contact us at contact@ledgerhound.vip. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7_p1: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, secure servers, and access controls. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.s8_p1: Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
privacy.s9_p1: We may update this policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of LedgerHound services provided by USPROJECT LLC. By using our website and services, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1_p1: LedgerHound provides blockchain forensic investigation services, automated wallet analysis reports, and free blockchain exploration tools. We are a forensic intelligence firm, not a law firm. We do not provide legal advice or legal representation.
terms.s2_p1: Automated Wallet Reports ($49) are charged at the time of purchase via Stripe. Reports are non-refundable once generation has begun, as the service is performed immediately upon payment.
terms.s2_p2: Custom forensic investigations require 50% payment upfront and 50% upon delivery of the final report. Payment terms are outlined in the engagement agreement.
terms.s3_p1: LedgerHound provides blockchain intelligence and forensic analysis. We do not guarantee the recovery of any cryptocurrency or funds. Tracing identifies where funds went — recovery requires legal action beyond our scope.
terms.s3_p2: Past case outcomes described on our website do not guarantee future results. Each case is unique and outcomes depend on factors outside our control.
terms.s4_p1: You agree not to use our services to:
terms.s4_i5: Use automated scripts to abuse our free tools
terms.s5_p1: All content, reports, tools, and branding on ledgerhound.vip are the property of USPROJECT LLC. Reports generated for you are licensed for your personal or legal use only.
terms.s6_p1: USPROJECT LLC's total liability for any claim arising from our services is limited to the amount you paid for the specific service giving rise to the claim. We are not liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages.
terms.s6_p2: Automated reports are generated by software and should not be used as the sole basis for legal action. For court-ready evidence, a certified forensic investigation is recommended.
terms.s7_p1: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless USPROJECT LLC and its officers, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of our services or violation of these terms.
terms.s8_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the State of New York, USA. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of New York.
terms.s9_p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our services after modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

disclaimer.title: Legal Disclaimer
disclaimer.s1_p1: LedgerHound is a blockchain forensic investigation service operating under USPROJECT LLC. We are not a law firm, and we do not provide legal advice, legal representation, or attorney services. For legal counsel, consult a licensed attorney in your jurisdiction.
disclaimer.s2_p1: The information provided on this website, in our reports, and through our tools is for informational and investigative purposes only. Nothing on this website or in our communications should be construed as legal advice.
disclaimer.s3_p1: Results of forensic investigations vary based on the specific facts of each case, the blockchain(s) involved, the time elapsed, and other factors. We provide blockchain intelligence and forensic analysis — we do not guarantee the recovery of any funds.
disclaimer.s3_p2: Past case outcomes, statistics, and examples described on our website are provided for illustrative purposes only and do not guarantee future results.
disclaimer.s4_p1: Automated wallet reports generated by our system are produced by software using publicly available blockchain data. These reports:
disclaimer.s4_i2: Should not be used as sole basis for legal action
disclaimer.s4_i3: May not identify all relevant entities or transactions
disclaimer.s4_i4: Use risk scores that are algorithmic estimates, not definitive assessments
disclaimer.s4_p2: For certified forensic reports suitable for court submission, expert testimony, and legal proceedings, contact us for a full investigation engagement.
disclaimer.s5_p1: Our analysis relies on blockchain data, entity attribution databases, and third-party intelligence sources. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee the completeness or accuracy of third-party data.
disclaimer.s6_p1: Use of our website, tools, and services is at your own risk. USPROJECT LLC is not responsible for decisions made based on information provided through our services.
disclaimer.s7_p1: Our services are provided from the United States. Users accessing our services from other jurisdictions do so at their own initiative and are responsible for compliance with local laws.

scam.title: Crypto Scam Address
scam.subtitle: Check if a cryptocurrency wallet address has been reported for scams, fraud, or sanctions. Powered by multiple databases including Chainabuse, OFAC SDN list, and LedgerHound intelligence.
scam.error_invalid: Please enter a valid Ethereum address (0x...)
scam.flagged_desc: This wallet address appears in one or more scam, fraud, or sanctions databases. Exercise extreme caution.
scam.clean_title: No reports found for this address
scam.clean_desc: This address does not appear in any of our scam or sanctions databases. Note: this does not guarantee the address is safe — always exercise caution.
scam.warning: WARNING: Do not send funds to this address. If you have been scammed, preserve all evidence and file a report.
scam.how_p1: Our crypto scam checker cross-references wallet addresses against multiple intelligence databases in real time. We check the OFAC sanctions list (SDN), community reports from Chainabuse, and our proprietary LedgerHound database of known scam wallets, mixers, and darknet addresses.
scam.how_p2: Whether you want to check if a bitcoin address is a scam, verify if a crypto wallet is safe before sending funds, or look up a wallet address blacklist — our free tool gives you an instant risk assessment based on real data.
scam.why_i1: Over $5.6 billion lost to crypto scams in 2023 according to FBI reports
scam.why_i2: Pig butchering scams use real-looking wallets that are actually fraud collectors
scam.why_i3: OFAC-sanctioned addresses can result in legal consequences if you transact with them
scam.why_i4: One quick check can save you from losing your entire investment
scam.cta_desc: Our free scam checker provides instant results. For comprehensive forensic analysis with entity identification, transaction mapping, and court-ready documentation — get a professional report.
scam.seo_title: Free Crypto Scam Address Checker | LedgerHound
scam.seo_desc: Check if a cryptocurrency wallet address has been reported for scams, fraud, or sanctions. Free blockchain security tool powered by multiple databases.
